videos.title: Build Canvas Apps in VS Code with AI (NEW Power Apps Tool)
videos.description:
Finally, we can build fully functional Power Apps Canvas Apps using VS Code or Claude Code via a new MCP Server. Have no clue what that means? Don't worry, in the video I show you both how to build an app AND how to get help debugging an existing app using these AI tool. 

My favorite part? Finding and fixing bugs in my old apps, that is something you can start using today. All experimental of course but very, very cool. 

Up your Power Apps Skills Today!
https://www.powerapps911.com/up-your-pow

videos.title: Copilot just got a major upgrade with Copilot Cowork
videos.description:
Copilot just leveled up. Copilot Cowork is a brand new experience built on technology from Anthropic that lets you describe a task, walk away, and come back to a finished result. 

In this video, I break down everything you need to know:
✅ What Copilot Cowork is and where it came from
✅ How it differs from regular Copilot
✅ How to access it via the Microsoft Frontier Program
✅ Scheduled tasks for set it and forget it automation inside M365

videos.title: Understanding The Agentic Reasoning Loop
videos.description: In this video, I got over the concept of agentic reasoning loops and how they work.  We discuss why it is so powerful, demo of one in M365 Copilot Analyst, and key things to know about them.  This is truly the moment where a chatbot becomes a coworker and the value of this process is amazing but is key to understand this process to be able to better use tools in the market and build agents.
